name: Disciple Media
description: Disciple Media — White-label community platform for building branded mobile and web community apps.

seo.title: Disciple Media — Customer Support SDK / In-app Helpdesk
seo.meta_description: Disciple Media: Disciple Media — White-label community platform for building branded mobile and web community apps.

when_to_use: White-label branded mobile community app for a media brand
Subscription community with native iOS and Android presence
Replacing Facebook groups with an owned community platform
Paid membership app with in-app content and gating
Brand-owned community with custom design and domain

pros: True white-label iOS and Android apps
Dedicated app store presence for your brand
cons: Expensive relative to Circle or Bettermode
Web experience weaker than native apps
Feature velocity slower than SaaS peers
review.verdict: The pick when you truly need your own branded app, not just a web community.
review.best_for: Creators and brands whose community must live as a standalone branded mobile app.
review.not_for: Teams fine with a web-first community under someone elses domain.
